children.label: A
children.text: section 4605(j)(1)(A) of title 50 (or any successor thereto);1See References in Text note below.1
Iran has ceased the pursuit, acquisition, and development of, and verifiably dismantled its, nuclear, biological, and chemical weapons and ballistic missiles and ballistic missile launch technology.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The President may waive the application of sanctions under section 103(b) [], the requirement to impose or maintain sanctions with respect to a person under section 105(a) [], 105A(a) [], 105B(a) [], or 105C(a) [], the requirement to include a person on the list required by section 105(b) [], 105A(b) [], 105B(b) [], or 105C(b) [], the application of the prohibition under section 106(a) [], or the imposition of the licensing requirement under section 303(c) [] with respect to a country designated as a Destination of Diversion Concern under section 303(a) [], if the President determines that such a waiver is in the national interest of the United States.22 U.S.C. 8512(b)22 U.S.C. 8514(a)22 U.S.C. 8514a(a)22 U.S.C. 8514b(a)22 U.S.C. 8514c(a)22 U.S.C. 8514(b)22 U.S.C. 8514a(b)22 U.S.C. 8514b(b)22 U.S.C. 8514c(b)22 U.S.C. 8515(a)22 U.S.C. 8543(c)22 U.S.C. 8543(a)

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: If the President waives the application of a provision pursuant to paragraph (1), the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report describing the reasons for the waiver.

children.heading: Special rule for report on waiving imposition of licensing requirement under section 303(c)
children.label: B Special rule for report on waiving imposition of licensing requirement under section 303(c)
children.text: In any case in which the President waives, pursuant to paragraph (1), the imposition of the licensing requirement under section 303(c) [] with respect to a country designated as a Destination of Diversion Concern under section 303(a) [], the President shall include in the report required by subparagraph (A) of this paragraph an assessment of whether the government of the country is taking the steps described in subparagraph (A) of section 303(d)(1) [].22 U.S.C. 8543(c)22 U.S.C. 8543(a)22 U.S.C. 8543(d)(1)(A)

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for the Department of State and the Department of the Treasury
children.label: 1 Authorization of appropriations for the Department of State and the Department of the Treasury
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State and to the Secretary of the Treasury such sums as may be necessary to implement the provisions of, and amendments made by, titles I and III of this Act [ et seq., 8541 et seq.].22 U.S.C. 8511

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations for the Department of Commerce
children.label: 2 Authorization of appropriations for the Department of Commerce
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of Commerce such sums as may be necessary to carry out title III [ et seq.].22 U.S.C. 8541
